metaTitle: Ethical Solar - Solar built to last, by a team you can trust.
metaDescription: We install the highest-quality solar panel systems and back them up with a 30-year warranty.

props.heading: Solar built to last, by a team you can trust.
props.subheading: We install the highest-quality solar panel systems and back them up with a 30-year warranty.

props.heading: Trusted by homeowners and installers — featuring leading solar brands:
What Ethical Solar Does
props.description: Solar is not just panels — it's a complete system. We design, install, and support solar + storage solutions that reduce bills, improve reliability, and deliver long-term savings.
props.bottomText: Want a clear estimate for your property? We'll model your roof, show expected production, and explain incentives available in your area.

services.problem: High electricity bills and unpredictable rate increases.
services.get: Site assessment, system design, premium panels + inverter, clean installation.
services.savings: Cuts monthly bills and increases home value with long-term energy security.

services.problem: Rising operating costs are eating into profit margins.
services.get: Energy audit, scalable design, performance modelling, compliant commercial install.
services.savings: Reduces overhead, improves sustainability reporting, and stabilizes energy spend.

services.problem: Grid outages and peak-hour costs reduce reliability and savings.
services.get: Battery sizing, backup setup, smart load control, hybrid-ready configuration.
services.savings: Stores solar for night use, improves resilience, and increases ROI over time.

services.get: Production monitoring, health checks, cleaning guidance, warranty support.
services.savings: Protects performance year-round and maximizes lifetime savings.

services.title: Solar for Home
services.description: Take control of your power with custom-designed rooftop solar. We design a system around your roof and budget.

services.title: Ground-Mounted Solar
services.description: If your roof is shaded or unsuitable, ground-mounted solar gives you maximum performance.

services.title: Solar for Small Business
services.description: Lower operating costs and lock in predictable bills. Capture incentives while keeping operations running.

services.title: Solar Battery Backup
services.description: Stay powered during outages. Store excess solar energy and use it when you need it most, day or night.

services.title: Battery Installation
services.description: Professional installation and seamless integration. Configured for safety, efficiency, and easy monitoring.

services.title: Smart Panel Installation
services.description: Upgrade to smart panels for control. Monitor usage, optimise loads, and make the most of your system.

props.heading: What We Do
props.description: We design and install reliable solar + storage systems for homes and businesses — with clear pricing, quality components, and long-term support.

services.title: Residential Solar
services.description: Custom rooftop solar systems designed for your home, usage, and budget — built to maximize long-term savings.

services.title: Commercial Solar
services.description: Scalable solar solutions for businesses to reduce operating costs and improve sustainability performance.

services.title: Battery Storage
services.description: Store energy for nights and outages. Add backup power and smarter savings with modern battery systems.

services.title: Maintenance & Monitoring
services.description: Ongoing monitoring, performance checks, and maintenance support to keep your system running at its best.

props.heading: Who We Build Solar For
props.description: Ethical Solar partners with homeowners and businesses to design solar + storage systems that reduce costs, improve reliability, and deliver long-term savings.

audiences.title: Homeowners (Residential)
audiences.description: For families who want lower power bills and long-term energy independence. We design clean, high-performance rooftop solar systems.

audiences.title: Commercial & Industrial
audiences.description: For businesses that want to reduce operating costs and improve sustainability metrics with scalable solar solutions.

audiences.title: Battery & Backup
audiences.description: For anyone who wants protection from outages and better savings by storing solar energy for night use and peak times.

audiences.title: Maintenance & Monitoring
audiences.description: For existing systems that need peak performance. Monitoring, inspections, and support to maximize lifetime production.

statsBlock.heading: Different properties. One goal: reliable savings with a solar system designed to last.

stats.label: Total Performance Warranty with long-term reliability assurance.
25 Years Product Warranty on Panels and 10 Years Product Warranty on Inverter & Batteries.
Bill reduction is possible for most properties, depending on usage and system size.
